markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on priorities and Stevie's role in a fast-paced environment.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Stevie's Role:** Bring order to chaos by orchestrating teams, managing risk, and enforcing focus on the core goal: validating Product Market Fit (PMF) and Go-to-Market Fit (GTM).](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Urgent Q1 Targets:** Achieve 100 paying customers and $200k ARR by quarter-end. This is a critical milestone; failure would force a major strategic pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Data Vendor Research:** Continue evaluating vendors (e.g., SimilarWeb) for potential cost savings, data backfills, and competitive intelligence, but only if it doesn't delay the Q1 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**No Roadmap Before PMF:** The company's sole focus is achieving PMF. A multi-year roadmap is premature and will only be created once the business model is validated.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Topics

### Challenge: Adapting to a High-Velocity Environment

  - [Stevie is adapting to a continuous release cycle, a shift from slower quarterly releases at previous companies (e.g., Human Signal).](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Avoiding assumptions; training to seek clarity even on seemingly obvious points.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Managing high randomization and context-switching.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Risk of errors from skimming documents or missing decisions made asynchronously in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Example:** A task reassignment for the "AI overview" feature was decided in Slack, requiring Stevie to reassign it from Jose to Pedro and pull Pedro from the "citation" task.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

### Solution: Stevie's Role as "Orchestrator"

  - [Marcel defined Stevie's role as bringing order and clarity to the chaos, not slowing it down.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [**Primary Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
      - [Orchestrate communication between engineering, growth, and customer teams.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
      - [Manage risk by identifying and flagging critical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Enforce focus on the core goal → validating PMF and GTM.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Proactively pull prioritization decisions from Marcel and Daniel.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Rationale: The Urgency of PMF/GTM Validation

  - [The company is operating with a "running out of cash" mindset to maintain urgency, though cash flow is not an immediate issue.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Validate PMF and GTM through self-serve and organic paths.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Why:** This is the only way to compete with well-funded rivals (e.g., Profound's $100M spend).](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Q1 Targets:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**100 paying customers**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**$200k ARR**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Consequence of Failure:** A major strategic pivot would be required.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Fiscal Year ARR Targets:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Low-end:** $2M](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**High-end:** $6M–$7M](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Data Vendor Research: Status & Strategy

  - [Research is ongoing; Stevie has POCs signed up with free credits.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**SimilarWeb:** Requires an NDA for a second call to discuss details.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Bright Data:** Focused on web scraping, not historical panel data.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Panel Data Overview:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Collected from user behavior via browser extensions.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Provides "ground truth" data for ML model validation.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**SimilarWeb:** Offers aggregated, topic-level data (e.g., "Nike shoes"), not granular, per-prompt details.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Strategic Value:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Cost Savings:** Potentially cheaper to buy historical data than collect it.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Data Backfills:** Fill gaps in historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Competitive Intelligence:** Understand how rivals operate.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Priority:** Continue research, but deprioritize if it delays the Q1 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Sign the NDA for SimilarWeb to schedule the second call.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Continue data vendor research, prioritizing it only when it doesn't delay the Q1 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Implement organizational systems (e.g., reminders) to manage tasks and prevent dropped balls.](https://fathom.video/share/9LXtfaWo-ZhNMFgbCMT1e2MsiDE7MJs9?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
